CONTENT.Career: Cuomo made his professional debut for Crotone in a Serie A 3–0 loss to Napoli on 12 March 2017. He stayed with Crotone through their relegation to Serie B and then Serie C.On 7 August 2023, Cuomo signed a three-year contract with Südtirol. On 10 January 2024, he was loaned to Vicenza, with an option to buy.
CONTENT.External links: Giuseppe Cuomo at F.C. Crotone (in Italian)Giuseppe Cuomo at TuttoCalciatori.net (in Italian)

SUMMARY: Giuseppe Cuomo (born 2 February 1998) is an Italian footballer who plays for Serie C Group A side Vicenza on loan from Südtirol as a defender.
